description: Overall i very satisfied with hal9 and rather than using GPT 4, i love hal9 better to analyze data
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Hal9 can analyze data accurate and fast without knowing how to do code on python or SQL. It's a game changers in analytics field
cons: The result can not be save into csv format or python format. So whenever i make a change in data, i have to go back to hal9 to analyze it again
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Impressive features and functionality (Impress Business with little effort)
description: As mentioned, very easy to use, impressed with the features and excited to see what else Hal9 has/will have to offer.
author: Jade G.
pros: The ease of use of this system, the fact that I could have a non-technical user and/or non-Business Analyst or Data analyst simply ask the questions that they would usually ask and receive the answers they are looking for immediately, is such a great selling point to this.
cons: The only issue I have here are the limitations of the free trial, If we can expand this to allow for a wider case study it would be far simpler to get a wider range of stakeholder buy in.Id like to allow more stakeholders to "play" with the system as opposed to me simply presenting it, specifically since they are not yet versed in AI and LLM's
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Li T.
pros: User-friendly interface. Prompt and helpful customer support.
cons: The responsiveness of the app could be improved.

description: I am impressed with its features and look forward to exploring the additional capabilities that Hal9 currently offers and will continue to develop in the future.
author: Lisa S.
pros: This tool requires an initial learning curve, but after a few attempts, its functionality becomes more intuitive, even for individuals like me without a technical or data-centric background. I primarily use it for visualizing my own datasets, and the process has become more efficient over time. Compared to other similar data visualization tools, it appears less daunting and more user-friendly, which enhances the overall experience.
cons: It would be beneficial to have additional resources such as tips and tutorials targeted at beginners to facilitate a smoother onboarding experience. Additionally, there is potential for improvement in the application's responsiveness, particularly in terms of optimizing performance and reducing latency during interactions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great analytics tool for business users
author: Valeria P.
pros: It´s very easy to use for non technical users
cons: I would like to see more app connectors.

review_title: Working with Hal9 was one of our best decisions when starting our AI project.
description: I have nothing but gratitude for my full experience with Hal9. Our project required a lot of custom integration and solutions and Hal9 was always up for the challenge. They helped turn our ambitious dreams into reality.
author: Jeff N.
pros: Working and communicating with the team at Hal9 has been the best part of my experience. Creating custom integration with our software and continuous creative problem solving from the team has been hugely impactful.
cons: I don't have any negative feedback. Any errors or issues I have experience while using Hal9 have been quickly addressed and resolved by the team.

description: Ágil limpieza en los diseños y procesos intuitivos
author: Javier D.
pros: Fácil uso y pasos simplificados para utilizar de inmediato
cons: Sin problemas, en nuestro equipo de trabajo tuvimos la gran experiencia de experimentar el desarrollo inicial y colaboramos en opinar para mejorar la herramienta.

review_title: Great for not so technical people
author: Alexandra G.
pros: Takes some getting used to but after a few initial tries the tool begins to make sense, even though I have zero technical/data background. I mostly use it to visualise own data sets, and it takes less time than before. It also seems less intimidating than some other similar data tools which is great.
cons: Would love to see more tips/tutorials for beginners
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
